objective: Audit current admin tenant operations, tenant switching, tenant scoping, and live schema readiness.

source_evidence.evidence: services/acquisition-api/internal/transport/router.go routes POST /v1/admin/tenants to CreateTenant; service requires PlatformScoped identity and writes tenant plus audit log.
frontend TenantService now exposes create via POST /v1/admin/tenants; TenantListComponent defaults to create mode and uses update only when editingTenantId is set.
TenantWorkspaceService resolves claim/bootstrap tenant options, stores selected tenant in sessionStorage, guard accepts tenant query params, interceptor attaches X-Tenant-Key and X-Tenant-Id.
Live PostgreSQL contains nrg ACTIVE tenant, migration_history rows for 016, 017, TMP-050, and tenant_id columns on the audited runtime tables.

live_checks: make status returned all eight services running.
OPTIONS localhost:8084/v1/admin/tenants allows Authorization, X-Tenant-Id, X-Tenant-Key.
OPTIONS localhost:8091/v1/admin/cadence/series allows Authorization, X-Admin-Token, X-Tenant-Id, X-Tenant-Key, X-Tenant-Channel-Id, X-Channel-Id.
OPTIONS localhost:8082/api/v1/notification/list returns CORS headers allowing X-Tenant-Id and X-Tenant-Key.
blocked_or_missing: Durable user-to-tenant membership management was not found as an admin UI/API surface; current dev access is bootstrap/platform scope plus tenant selection.

Subscription External tenant scoping is present in routing, audit logs, CORS, and tenant routing service, but end-to-end admin auth and every list filter path were not fully exhaustively verified in this pass.
